Class ClanPermissionHolder

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.clans.gui.ClanPermissionHolder
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.inventory.InventoryHolder
public class ClanPermissionHolder extends Object implements org.bukkit.inventory.InventoryHolder
Inventory holder identifying an open clan permission GUI.

Carries only identifiers and a slot-to-permission routing map; it holds no mutable permission state. The current state is always re-read from the cache when the menu is (re)built, keeping the database as the single source of truth.

  • Constructor Details

    • ClanPermissionHolder

      public ClanPermissionHolder(ClanPermissionMenu menu, UUID viewerId, UUID targetId, UUID clanId, Map<Integer, ClanPermission> slotToPermission)
      Parameters:
      menu - the menu that built this inventory, used to rebuild on toggle
      viewerId - the player viewing the GUI
      targetId - the member whose permissions are being edited
      clanId - the clan both players belong to
      slotToPermission - maps a capability slot to its base ClanPermission

    • permissionAt

      public @Nullable ClanPermission permissionAt(int slot)
      Parameters:
      slot - the raw slot clicked
      Returns:
      the base capability mapped to that slot, or null if the slot is not a capability icon
